name: codex-context-studio
description: Safely inspect, edit, and budget Codex rollout context while Codex is idle.

interface.shortDescription: Edit rollout context with structural guardrails.
interface.longDescription: A local visual editor for Codex rollout JSONL files with safe generated-item deletion, token estimates, live status, versioned backups, race detection, validation, and atomic saves.
defaultPrompt: Open Context Studio for an idle Codex task.
